command.description: Generates complete parametric elliptical propellers from transitioning NACA 4-digit airfoil sections.
command.name: Elliptical NACA Propeller Generator
error.active_component_required: Fusion did not provide a valid active component.
error.design_required: Open or create a Fusion Design document before running the command.

The add-in loaded but could not find the SOLID > CREATE panel.
The command remains registered with ID: {id}

Partial features may remain in the timeline because their group could not be created:
{detail}
error.timeline_post_commit:

{detail}

result.robust_preflight_no_geometry: The robust search ended before final geometry was committed. No wrapped-section sketches or blade features were left behind.
result.robust_search_cancelled: Robust preflight was cancelled after {attempts} started candidate(s). No final geometry was created.
result.robust_search_fail: Robust preflight exhausted {attempts} candidate(s) without finding a valid, smooth, and finalizable loft.
result.robust_search_fairing_tolerated: Robust preflight accepted the first finalizable strategy after {attempts} candidate(s): all sampled stations beyond the configured root transition met the strict targets, while deviations inside the fairing and post-fairing margin were reported as a warning.
result.robust_search_fallback: Robust preflight did not meet every strict quality target, but selected the best geometrically valid and finalizable fallback after {attempts} candidate(s). Review the quality report.
result.robust_search_success: Robust preflight accepted a complete strategy after {attempts} candidate(s).

result.timeline_group_invalid_design: The design captured before generation is no longer valid.
result.timeline_group_missing_timeline: The captured design no longer exposes a timeline.
result.timeline_group_nested: The generated timeline range contains an existing group and cannot be grouped again.
result.timeline_group_no_items: No new timeline items were committed after the command ended (captured start index: {start}; current count: {count}).
result.timeline_group_single_item: Timeline group not created: this run committed only one timeline item at index {index}, and Fusion requires at least two items for a standard timeline group.
result.timeline_group_skipped_direct: Timeline grouping skipped: the active design uses direct modeling and has no parametric feature timeline.
result.timeline_group_skipped_marker: Timeline grouping skipped: the timeline marker was not at the end before generation.
result.timeline_group_skipped_no_design: Timeline grouping skipped: there is no active Fusion design.
result.timeline_group_skipped_no_timelin: Timeline grouping skipped: the active design exposes no timeline.
result.wrapped: A separate sketch was created for each wrapped section, with a 3D NACA spline and a wrapped 3D trailing-edge closing spline.

Could not load the selected configuration.

{detail}
sample.invalid_count: {count} invalid JSON configuration file(s) were ignored.
sample.loaded_message: Configuration “{name}” was loaded into the dialog. No geometry was generated.
sample.loaded_status: Loaded into the dialog. The saved user configuration is unchanged until Generate is pressed.
sample.no_description: No description was provided by this JSON file.
sample.none_found:
No valid JSON configurations were found under:
{path}
ui.boundary_overlap_diameter_tooltip: Diameter difference used to make the root and tip loft surfaces cross the nominal Boundary Fill cylinders. Default: 0.0001 mm.
ui.cut_below: Cut everything below the hub base (Z=0)
ui.finalization_method_tooltip: Boundary Fill is the default. It uses the loft and nominal inner/outer cylinders as boundaries and keeps the largest positive-volume cell.
ui.info: Values are loaded from the last user configuration when available, otherwise from factory defaults.
ui.load_sample_tooltip: Load this configuration into the dialog
ui.load_sample_tooltip_description: Fills the current controls from the selected JSON. It does not generate geometry or overwrite the saved user configuration until Generate is pressed.
ui.loft_construction_mode_tooltip: Manual orders only. The split mode lofts the open NACA contour first, lofts the trailing-edge closure separately with two rails through the exact trailing-edge vertices, then stitches both surfaces. Partial features are preserved if any stage fails. Automatic robust continues using the closed-profile method for now.
ui.loft_distributed_rail_count_tooltip: Odd values only. Manual loft orders use this exact count. Automatic robust treats it as an upper limit but searches through at least 9 rails when Profile Points permits.
ui.loft_guide_rails_tooltip: Manual orders use the selected mode on the main blade surface. In split trailing-edge construction, the separate trailing-edge loft always uses two rails through the exact trailing-edge vertices. Automatic robust currently uses the closed-profile method and progressively adds distributed rails.
ui.loft_quality_check: Check loft surface quality in Automatic robust
ui.loft_quality_check_tooltip: Checks fidelity against the theoretical intermediate sections. Strict targets rank candidates; if none passes, Automatic robust can still select the best geometrically valid and finalizable fallback.
ui.loft_quality_max_deviation_percent_to: Maximum local positional difference from the theoretical blade, normalized by local chord. Short-period finish is judged separately by wave angle.
ui.loft_quality_max_wave_angle_deg_toolt: Equivalent slope derived from deviation and local section spacing. It is a strict comparison target and diagnostic, not a direct measurement of surface curvature or zebra-stripe waviness. Default: 0.2 degrees.
ui.loft_quality_post_fairing_margin_mult: Length after the fairing that is treated as part of the root transition for Automatic robust quality acceptance, expressed as a multiple of Fairing Size. Default: 2.0. A value of 0 ends tolerance at the fairing boundary.
ui.loft_rail_placement_tooltip: Uniform chord is recommended and keeps rails away from the sensitive trailing-edge closure. The other modes preserve the previous comparison tests.
ui.loft_rails_use_te_vertices: Anchor first rail pair on trailing-edge vertices
ui.loft_rails_use_te_vertices_tooltip: Temporary comparison option. Checked: the upper/lower anchor rails pass through the exact trailing-edge vertices. Unchecked: they use the first profile points after those vertices.
ui.loft_section_order_tooltip: Manual orders use exactly the selected guide mode. Automatic robust tests root-to-tip then tip-to-root, progressively increases distributed rails, evaluates the worst surface deviation, and increases Boundary Fill overlap by 10× when needed.
ui.radius_info: In automatic modes, the root, NACA transition and tip are always included exactly. In Slices mode, the final count can be Slices + 2 when the transition does not coincide with the grid.
ui.samples_scan_tooltip_description: Every .json file found recursively under {path} is added when the command opens. Built-in and user configurations are listed together.
ui.spinner_description: Creates one spinner type. Parabolic and rounded-ogive spinners are mutually exclusive.
ui.spinner_info: Spinners start at Z=0. The Hole_Diameter cut runs from Z=-0.5 mm to Z=Hub_Length+1.0 mm, matching the SCAD model. Both spinner types can be enabled together.
ui.tip_ring_description: Creates one ring type at the blade tips. Rectangular and aerodynamic rings are mutually exclusive.
ui.new_sample_name_tooltip: Name used for a user-created JSON configuration.
ui.save_sample_tooltip: Save every current parameter as a new JSON configuration
sample.name_required: Enter a name for the new configuration.
sample.user_description: User-created configuration saved from the Fusion dialog.
sample.error_save:
Could not save the current configuration.

{detail}

progress.manual.stage_detail_stitch: Joining the main surface and trailing edge.
progress.manual.stage_detail_cylinders: Building the inner and outer radial tools.

progress.manual.stage_detail_assembly: Applying pattern, hub, rings and spinner as requested.

{detail}
result.timeline_group_not_started: Timeline grouping was not applicable because geometry creation had not started.
ui.propeller_orientation_tooltip: Rigidly reorients the completed assembly. It does not change Prop_Direction, Sweep_Angle, or pitch.
propeller_orientation.standard: Standard — hub base at Z=0, spinner toward +Z

progress.manual.stage_detail_orientation: Flipping the blade 180° around the Root_Length reference before the pattern, hub, and spinner are created.
